title: Context Contracts leverage plan — forensic verification + corrected contracts
question: Are the load-bearing claims of the Context Contracts leverage plan (the context-contracts schema + gather-execution-context behavior, the named relation_types + their directions, the specific item edges, the quantitative + lens/invariant claims) accurate against the real pi-context op source and the live .context substrate — and what is the corrected, source-verified form of each proposed contract.
method: Code-inspection of the gather-execution-context implementation (pi-context/src/execution-context.ts + context.ts walk primitives) and substrate query (config.json relation_types/invariants, relations.json edges, the context-contracts schema) via the pi-context CLI; each direction verified against the stored parent->child edge convention.
findings_summary: The Context Contracts machinery is present and installed: the context-contracts schema, the gather-execution-context op, and every relation_type the leverage plan names. Verifying the plan's claims against the op source and the live substrate established several corrections. gather-execution-context performs an independent single-hop walk per declared relation_type from the work unit; it does not chain, so a task contract reaches the task's direct edges (its story, its phase, its dependency chain, and any direct gap/decision/feature/verification edges) but not its feature-via-story. max_depth is recorded, not enforced, in the current build. The direction value is one of in|out|both; for a task, story_contains_task and verification_verifies_item resolve as in, task_depends_on_task as in (a task's prerequisites are its ancestors), and task_addresses_gap / task_addresses_feature / task_governed_by_decision as out. The graph holds 261 edges across 14 of 30 registered relation_types. A decision contract reaches only the substrate DEC-0001..0005 (the seed-round DECs are not substrate items); eight relation_types the plan names have no edges. The corrected task, verification, feature, and framework-gap contracts are viable; the decision contract is deferred. The corrected, schema-valid contracts and the full claim-by-claim verification are in the findings_document (section IV.B).
findings_document: docs/2026 06 15 Project pi-context Usage Audit & Optimization Report.md

citations.label: gather-execution-context impl (lookup by unit_kind / closure walk / direction / Math.min maxDepth / empty buckets / 3 error-returns)
context-contracts schema (direction enum in|out|both; required created_by/created_at; id ^CTX-\d{3,}$; arrayKey contracts)
real edges (261 total; 14 of 30 registered relation_types in use; per-type counts)
TASK-043 graph (12 inbound task_depends_on_task prereqs; STORY-010; PHASE-PROMPTWORKSHOP-RUNNER; no gap/decision/feature/verification edges)
decision split (substrate DEC-0001..0005 vs product DEC-44.. in seed-round-plan)

dependencies: pi-context engine @ /Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension/packages/pi-context (execution-context.ts + context.ts walk primitives); catalog @davidorex/pi-context@0.30.0

stale_conditions: gather-execution-context gains real depth-bounding (max_depth becomes enforced)
the context-contracts schema direction enum changes from in|out|both
the registered relation_type set or the stored parent->child edge convention changes
the relation edge counts shift materially from the 2026-06-15 snapshot (261 edges)
